title: Partnership
description:
Drive ships with partners.
Defend your port with cannons and explore the world with new ships!
body: [](https://modfest.net/1.20) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) ## Arr! Welcome sailor! How about some brand new ships for the sea? **Partnership** comes with three new variants of them! Travel with **up to three passengers** in a **Kayak** or rescue a _landlubber_ from the dangerous water with an **Lifebuoy**. Craft all the ships from the seven seas using the **Boatyard Table**. There also are some more belongings like new **hats for the captain and their sailors** or a **Marine Cannon** to defend!
